guidelines: Clearly communicate why the area is empty
Use illustration or icon to soften the empty feeling
Keep the message encouraging and helpful
colorGuidance: Primary brand color for the action button
Light neutral background to maintain page consistency
spacingGuidance: Center the content vertically and horizontally
commonMistakes: Generic 'No data' message with no guidance
Illustration that does not match the brand style
Empty state that looks like a broken page
qualityChecklist: Message explains the empty state clearly
There is an actionable next step
Visual style matches the rest of the application
Empty state is tested for different scenarios (new user, no results, error)
